mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Workers' Compensation Law in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mark Talley at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Workers' Compensation Law serving Ogden. Mark is an award-winning attorney at Just Work Comp Law, whose expertise in workers' compensation law began in 2018 as a paralegal. In this role, Mark distinguished himself in case management, client relations, and meticulous attention to case details. After completing his law degree in 2024, Mark transitioned to an attorney position, where he is fully committed to maximizing his clients' case outcomes. He is admitted to practice law in Utah. Mark earned his Bachelor's degree from Brigham Young University and his Juris Doctor (JD) from Nova Southeastern University. He is an active member of the Utah Association for Justice, the Government/Administrative Law Bar, the Salt Lake County Bar, and the Utah Association Criminal Defense Lawyers. Outside of his professional life, Mark enjoys paddle boarding and spending quality time with his family. To explore how Mark can assist with your workers' compensation case, contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 for a free consultation. Contact us at 801-746-0290.

mainEntity.name: Does Mark Talley handle Workers' Compensation Law cases in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Mark Talley at Just Work Comp Law specializes in Workers' Compensation Law and serves clients in Ogden and surrounding areas. Credentials: Bar #1001540408.
